name: Fanny
intro: Fanny, the Blade Dancer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Air Superiority
abilities.description: Buff During fight, Fanny deals 10%–20% extra damage to enemies hit (scales with flying speed [ speed unknown ] ) and applies a stack of Prey Mark to them (up to 2 stacks) on each attack. Her subsequent skill hits on marked enemy heroes restore 8 energy per stack for her. The energy restoration is reduced [ amount unknown ] if she hits multiple enemy heroes within a short period of time. [ duration unknown ]

abilities.name: Tornado Strike
abilities.description: AOE Fanny whirls her blades, dealing 275–525 (+85% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Steel Cable
abilities.description: Mobility No way I'm going on foot! Fanny shoots a cable in the target direction that pulls her to the first obstacle hit. She can cast this skill again within 2 seconds until her energy runs out. Each successive cast reduces the skill's energy cost by 2. Fanny automatically casts Tornado Strike upon hitting an enemy mid-flight, as long as her energy is sufficient. Skill terms Charge Movement ability that cannot pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Cut Throat
abilities.description: Burst Mobility Fanny leaps at the target enemy hero or Creep with her blades, dealing 400–650 (+200% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage . Each stack of Prey Mark of the target increases this damage by 30%. Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.
